About Arrow Roofing and Siding

12+ years serving Columbus and surrounding areas

Arrow Roofing and Siding started with a simple goal: to provide Columbus homeowners with durable, beautiful siding solutions they can rely on. We're a local company, not a franchise, and we take pride in our reputation for quality workmanship and honest service.

Our approach is straightforward: we listen to your needs, assess your home's specific challenges (like Columbus' freeze-thaw cycles and clay soil shifts), and recommend the best siding options for your budget and style. No high-pressure sales, just expert advice.

We're deeply committed to the Columbus community. From sponsoring local youth sports teams to volunteering with Habitat for Humanity, we believe in giving back to the neighborhoods we serve. We're not just building better homes; we're building a better community.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Arrow Roofing And Siding

Trusted siding contractor professionals serving Columbus, OH and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
